subtasks.description: Query MongoDB to retrieve all active billing contracts with contracted annual value and contract details
Query SQL invoice ledger for all invoices issued in 2024, aggregated by contract ID with total amount invoiced per contract
Reconcile contracted annual values against 2024 invoice totals, calculate variance percentage, flag contracts with >10% variance, and produce reconciliation report with classification

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks: (1) mongo_query to fetch active contracts from MongoDB contract store (small tier – straightforward active contract query), (2) sql_gen to aggregate 2024 invoices from SQL ledger (small tier – single aggregation by contract), (3) cross_recon to reconcile the two sources, calculate variance, apply 10% threshold, and flag outliers (mid tier – requires joining two sources, variance calculation logic, and classification). Total is minimal because we fetch contracts and invoices in one call each, then reconcile once. No separate policy_action is needed; variance flagging is inherent to the reconciliation step.

output.sql: SELECT contract_id, SUM(amount_usd) as total_amount_invoiced, COUNT(*) as invoice_count FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY contract_id ORDER BY contract_id
